compile-gate-command-fallback.description: Not set in workflow-config; compile-gate fails closed until a project-specific command is configured.

compile-gate-command.label: Compile-gate command
compile-gate-command.description: Command compile-gate runs for compile/build/type-check validation. When unconfigured, compile-gate fails closed until a project-specific command is configured.

full-suite-enabled.label: Mandatory full-suite validation
full-suite-enabled.description: Controls whether the configured full-suite test command is part of the task lifecycle.

true.label: On
true.description: The configured full-suite command is required in the task lifecycle.

false.label: Off
false.description: The full-suite gate is skipped unless another workflow path requires it.

full-suite-command.label: Full-suite command
full-suite-command.description: Command the full-suite gate runs when mandatory full-suite validation is enabled.

full-suite-timeout-ms.label: Full-suite timeout
full-suite-timeout-ms.description: Maximum runtime for the full-suite command, in milliseconds.

full-suite-green-summary-max-lines.label: Green full-suite summary length
full-suite-green-summary-max-lines.description: How many successful full-suite output lines stay visible in compact task evidence.

full-suite-red-failure-chunk-lines.label: Failure output chunk length
full-suite-red-failure-chunk-lines.description: How many failing full-suite lines are kept per compact failure chunk.

full-suite-out-of-scope-failure-policy.label: Out-of-scope failure handling
full-suite-out-of-scope-failure-policy.description: What the workflow does when full-suite output shows a failure outside the current task scope.

AUDIT_AND_BLOCK.label: Audit and block
AUDIT_AND_BLOCK.description: Records the out-of-scope failure and stops the workflow until it is resolved.

AUDIT_AND_WARN.label: Audit and warn
AUDIT_AND_WARN.description: Records the out-of-scope failure but allows the workflow to continue with a warning.

full-suite-placement.label: Full-suite placement
full-suite-placement.description: Where the mandatory full-suite gate runs in the task lifecycle.

after_compile_before_reviews.label: After compile, before reviews
after_compile_before_reviews.description: Runs the full suite after compile passes and before reviewer work starts.

before_test_review.label: Before test review
before_test_review.description: Runs the full suite immediately before the test-review lane needs its evidence.

before_completion.label: Before completion
before_completion.description: Defers the full suite until the final completion path.

review-execution-policy.label: Review execution mode
review-execution-policy.description: Controls whether required review lanes run in parallel, wait for code review, or run sequentially.

parallel_all.label: parallel all
parallel_all.description: All review types may be prepared independently; no upstream launch dependencies apply.

test_after_code.label: test after code
test_after_code.description: Only test waits for a current-cycle code PASS; other review types stay independent.

code_first_optional.label: code first optional
code_first_optional.description: API, performance, infra, and dependency wait for code PASS; test remains downstream of all required upstream reviews.

strict_sequential.label: strict sequential
strict_sequential.description: All required reviews follow the canonical review order one by one for the current cycle.

scope-budget-enabled.label: Scope budget guard
scope-budget-enabled.description: Warns or blocks when a task is too large for the configured profile budget.

true.label: On
true.description: Scope budget checks warn or block when a task exceeds the configured profile budget.

false.label: Off
false.description: Scope budget limits are not enforced for task-size decisions.

scope-budget-action.label: Scope budget action
scope-budget-action.description: What happens when the scope budget is exceeded.

BLOCK_FOR_SPLIT.label: Block for split
BLOCK_FOR_SPLIT.description: Stops oversized work and asks the operator or agent to split it.

WARN_ONLY.label: Warn only
WARN_ONLY.description: Shows the scope warning but does not stop the next lifecycle step.

scope-budget-profiles.label: Scope budget profiles
scope-budget-profiles.description: Task profiles where the scope budget guard applies. Unknown legacy values are shown explicitly instead of being dropped.

scope-budget-max-files.label: Scope budget file limit
scope-budget-max-files.description: Maximum changed-file count before the scope budget guard reacts.

scope-budget-max-changed-lines.label: Scope budget changed-line limit
scope-budget-max-changed-lines.description: Maximum changed-line count before the scope budget guard reacts.

scope-budget-max-required-reviews.label: Scope budget review-lane limit
scope-budget-max-required-reviews.description: Maximum required review-lane count before the scope budget guard reacts.

scope-budget-max-review-tokens.label: Scope budget review-token forecast
scope-budget-max-review-tokens.description: Maximum estimated review-token budget before the scope budget guard reacts.

review-cycle-enabled.label: Review-cycle guard
review-cycle-enabled.description: Detects repeated non-test review loops before they consume too much work.

true.label: On
true.description: Repeated non-test review loops are detected before closeout continues.

false.label: Off
false.description: Review-cycle pressure is not checked by this guard.

review-cycle-action.label: Review-cycle action
review-cycle-action.description: What happens when repeated review attempts exceed configured limits.

BLOCK_FOR_OPERATOR_DECISION.label: Block for operator decision
BLOCK_FOR_OPERATOR_DECISION.description: Stops repeated review loops until an operator chooses the recovery path.

WARN_ONLY.label: Warn only
WARN_ONLY.description: Reports review-cycle pressure but lets the workflow continue.

review-cycle-max-failed-non-test-reviews.label: Failed non-test review limit
review-cycle-max-failed-non-test-reviews.description: Maximum failed non-test review attempts before the review-cycle guard reacts.

review-cycle-max-total-non-test-reviews.label: Total non-test review limit
review-cycle-max-total-non-test-reviews.description: Maximum total non-test review attempts before the review-cycle guard reacts.

review-cycle-excluded-review-types.label: Excluded review types
review-cycle-excluded-review-types.description: Review lanes ignored by the review-cycle guard. Values are selected from known review contract keys and current capability config.

review-cycle-auto-split-enabled.label: Automatic review-cycle split prompt
review-cycle-auto-split-enabled.description: Allows review-cycle pressure to emit an auto-split prompt when the action is BLOCK_FOR_OPERATOR_DECISION. It has no blocking effect while action is WARN_ONLY.

true.label: On
true.description: Review-cycle pressure can emit the auto-split prompt when the action is BLOCK_FOR_OPERATOR_DECISION.

false.label: Off
false.description: Review-cycle pressure never emits the auto-split prompt.

project-memory-enabled.label: Project-memory maintenance
project-memory-enabled.description: Controls whether closeout checks project-memory impact.

true.label: On
true.description: Closeout checks whether project-memory impact evidence is needed.

false.label: Off
false.description: Closeout does not run project-memory maintenance checks.

project-memory-mode.label: Project-memory mode
project-memory-mode.description: How strongly the workflow enforces project-memory impact work.

off.label: Off
off.description: Do not run project-memory maintenance during closeout.

check.label: Check
check.description: Check whether memory updates are needed without writing them.

update.label: Update
update.description: Allow the workflow to update focused project-memory files when needed.

strict.label: Strict
strict.description: Require memory evidence before closeout can pass.

project-memory-run-before-final-closeout.label: Run memory check before final closeout
project-memory-run-before-final-closeout.description: Runs project-memory maintenance before the final completion step.

true.label: On
true.description: Project-memory maintenance runs before the final completion step.

false.label: Off
false.description: Project-memory maintenance is not inserted before final closeout.

project-memory-require-user-approval-for.label: Require user approval for memory writes
project-memory-require-user-approval-for.description: Requires explicit user approval before the workflow writes project-memory files.

true.label: On
true.description: Project-memory writes require explicit user approval before the workflow writes files.

false.label: Off
false.description: Project-memory writes can proceed under the configured maintenance mode without an extra approval step.

project-memory-max-compact-summary-chars.label: Project-memory compact summary size
project-memory-max-compact-summary-chars.description: Maximum generated compact project-memory summary size, in characters.

project-memory-read-strategy.label: Project-memory read strategy
project-memory-read-strategy.description: How agents should read durable memory at task start.

index_first.label: index first
index_first.description: Read the memory index first and open detailed files only when the index points to them.

project-memory-impact-retention-days.label: Project-memory impact retention
project-memory-impact-retention-days.description: How many days project-memory impact artifacts are retained.

true.label: On
true.description: Confirmed task reset and discard commands are available through guarded paths.

false.label: Off
false.description: Task reset and discard mutations are unavailable.

auto-backup-enabled.label: Scheduled auto-backups
auto-backup-enabled.description: Allows the daily maintenance trigger to create scheduled rollback backups when due.

true.label: On
true.description: Daily maintenance may create scheduled rollback backups when the interval is due.

false.label: Off
false.description: Daily maintenance will not create scheduled rollback backups.

auto-backup-interval-days.label: Auto-backup interval
auto-backup-interval-days.description: Minimum number of days between successful scheduled backups.

auto-backup-keep-latest.label: Auto-backup retention
auto-backup-keep-latest.description: Number of latest backups to keep after a scheduled backup is created.

garda-self-guard.label: Garda self-guard
garda-self-guard.description: Controls whether agents may directly enter protected Garda control-plane work.

deny_agent_entry.label: On
deny_agent_entry.description: Agents cannot enter protected control-plane work without the operator-owned path.

require_operator_confirmation.label: Operator confirmation
require_operator_confirmation.description: Protected control-plane entry requires explicit operator confirmation.
